title: Monitor Build Workflow #26098642460
command: cd /Users/xuyingzhou/Project/study-desktop/pi-agent-template && BUILD_RUN=26098642460 && for i in $(seq 1 60); do STATUS=$(gh run view $BUILD_RUN --json status,conclusion --jq '"\(.status)|\(.conclusion // "running")"') && echo "[$(date '+%H:%M:%S')] $STATUS" && RUNNING=$(echo $STATUS | cut -d'|' -f1) && if [ "$RUNNING" != "queued" ] && [ "$RUNNING" != "in_progress" ]; then TOTAL=$(gh run view $BUILD_RUN --json jobs --jq '.jobs | length') && OK=$(gh run view $BUILD_RUN --json jobs --jq '[.jobs[] | select(.conclusion == "success")] | length') && FAIL=$(gh run view $BUILD_RUN --json jobs --jq '[.jobs[] | select(.conclusion == "failure")] | length') && echo "" && echo "✅ $OK/$TOTAL  ❌ $FAIL" && echo "" && gh run view $BUILD_RUN --json jobs --jq '.jobs[] | "  \(.name): \(.conclusion // .status)"' && CONCLUSION=$(echo $STATUS | cut -d'|' -f2) && if [ "$CONCLUSION" = "success" ]; then echo "" && echo "🎉 全部通过！"; else echo "" && echo "❌ 失败：" && for jid in $(gh run view $BUILD_RUN --json jobs --jq '.jobs[] | select(.conclusion == "failure") | .databaseId'); do echo "---" && gh run view --job $jid --log 2>&1 | grep -E "FAIL|verified|DMG|AppImage|exe|size" | tail -20; done; fi && break; fi && sleep 30; done

title: Monitor Build v2 #26098642460
command: cd /Users/xuyingzhou/Project/study-desktop/pi-agent-template && BUILD_RUN=26098642460 && for i in $(seq 1 80); do STATUS=$(gh run view $BUILD_RUN --json status,conclusion --jq '"\(.status)|\(.conclusion // "running")"') && echo "[$(date '+%H:%M:%S')] $STATUS" && RUNNING=$(echo $STATUS | cut -d'|' -f1) && if [ "$RUNNING" != "queued" ] && [ "$RUNNING" != "in_progress" ]; then TOTAL=$(gh run view $BUILD_RUN --json jobs --jq '.jobs | length') && OK=$(gh run view $BUILD_RUN --json jobs --jq '[.jobs[] | select(.conclusion == "success")] | length') && FAIL=$(gh run view $BUILD_RUN --json jobs --jq '[.jobs[] | select(.conclusion == "failure")] | length') && echo "" && echo "=== Final Results ===" && echo "✅ $OK/$TOTAL  ❌ $FAIL" && echo "" && gh run view $BUILD_RUN --json jobs --jq '.jobs[] | "  \(.name): \(.conclusion // .status)"' && CONCLUSION=$(echo $STATUS | cut -d'|' -f2) && if [ "$CONCLUSION" = "success" ]; then echo "" && echo "🎉 全部通过！"; else echo "" && echo "❌ 失败 Jobs：" && for jid in $(gh run view $BUILD_RUN --json jobs --jq '.jobs[] | select(.conclusion == "failure") | .databaseId'); do echo "---" && gh run view --job $jid --log 2>&1 | grep -E "FAIL|verified|DMG|AppImage|exe|size|Error|error:" | tail -30; done; fi && break; fi && sleep 30; done
